scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && concurrently -n server,hf-images,lms-images,vite -c yellow,magenta,blue,cyan --kill-others-on-fail "node server.js" ".venv/bin/python3 hf-image-server/main.py" ".venv/bin/python3 lms-image-server/main.py" "wait-on http://localhost:3001/health && vite --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.tauri:dev: npm run kill-ports && npm run build:server && tauri dev
scripts.build:server: npx esbuild server.js --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=server.bundle.cjs && npx pkg server.bundle.cjs --targets node20-macos-arm64 --no-bytecode --public --output src-tauri/binaries/bridge-aarch64-apple-darwin && cp src-tauri/binaries/bridge-aarch64-apple-darwin src-tauri/binaries/bridge-x86_64-apple-darwin && rm server.bundle.cjs
scripts.build:pyserver: cd hf-image-server && ../.venv/bin/pyinstaller main.py --onedir --name hf-image-server --distpath ../src-tauri/binaries --paths ../.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages --add-data "routes.py:." --add-data "services.py:." --add-data "adaptors:adaptors" --add-data "domain:domain" --hidden-import routes --hidden-import services --hidden-import adaptors --hidden-import domain --hidden-import uvicorn.logging --hidden-import uvicorn.loops.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.http.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.websockets.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.lifespan.on --collect-all diffusers --collect-all transformers --collect-all tokenizers --copy-metadata transformers --copy-metadata huggingface_hub --copy-metadata diffusers --copy-metadata tokenizers --copy-metadata safetensors --copy-metadata accelerate --copy-metadata tqdm --copy-metadata packaging --copy-metadata filelock --copy-metadata pyyaml --copy-metadata regex --copy-metadata numpy --noconfirm && mv ../src-tauri/binaries/hf-image-server/hf-image-server ../src-tauri/binaries/hf-image-server/hf-image-server-aarch64-apple-darwin && cp ../src-tauri/binaries/hf-image-server/hf-image-server-aarch64-apple-darwin ../src-tauri/binaries/hf-image-server/hf-image-server-x86_64-apple-darwin && for d in requests tqdm urllib3 idna certifi charset_normalizer; do cp -r ../.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/${d}-*.dist-info ../src-tauri/binaries/hf-image-server/_internal/ 2>/dev/null || true; done
